name: voice-room-desktop
description: Electron desktop shell for Voice Room.

scripts.check: node --check electron/main.js && node --check electron/preload.js && node --check electron/screen-picker-preload.js && node --check electron/screen-picker.js && node --check electron/native-audio.js && node --check scripts/build-electron.js && node --check scripts/build-native-audio.js && node --check scripts/capture-picker-preview.js && node --check scripts/clean-dist.js && node --check scripts/create-electron-config.js && node --check scripts/validate-release-version.js && node --check electron-builder.config.js
scripts.desktop: node scripts/create-electron-config.js && npm run native:build && electron .
